title: Expanded Iron Bundles
description: Bundles with more storage space, and new functionalities in the future.
body:
# Expanded Iron Bundles Small mod that provides bundles with more storage space, and new functionalities in the future. ## Warning The version 0.0.1 and 0.0.2 of the mod have an issue where inserting more than 127 of a single item type will cause it to "disapears" from the bundle.
The version 0.0.3 of the mod fixes this issue and may bring back some items bugged bundles. ## Features ### Current * Recipe for the vanilla bundle with rabbit hide * Multiple variants with more storage space and special properties * Copper Bundle (128 slots / 2 stacks) * Iron Bundle (256 slots / 4 stacks) * Gold Bundle (384 slots / 6 stacks) * Diamond Bundle (512 slots / 8 stacks) * Ancient Scraps Bundle (896 slots / 14 stacks) * Netherite Bundle (1024 slots / 16 stacks & Immune to fire and lava) ### Planned * Versions for Forge and previous versions of Minecraft * A config file to enable/disable specific bundles, change capacity * Better visuals for the occupancy bar * More bundles with special mecanics (i.e.: Ender Bundle, ...) * Bundle modifiers (i.e.: Piston to throw items further, ...) * Imrpoved bundle mecanics (i.e.: Swapping last inserted item, Thrown single stack, ...) ## Versions ### Fabric ✖️ 1.18 and earlier - Should be comming soon...
✔️ 1.19 & 1.19.1 - Actively supported ### Forge ✖️ 1.18 and earlier - Should be comming soon...
✖️ 1.19 & 1.19.1 - Will come once Forge supports it ## Requirements ### Fabric * Fabric API * NBT Crafting ### Forge N/A ## Known Issues * The original bundle is not showing in the creative menu * Recipes aren't unlocked when picking up one of the ingredients * The bundle's inventory preview shows a cross when the occupancy reaches 64 or more ## License Apache V2
